phases.name: API Routes Configuration
phases.description: Update ApiRoutes class with missing and incorrect route constants. This is the foundation for all other updates.

tasks.title: Fix incorrect path: AMODIATAIRES_ANNOUNCEMENTS
tasks.description: Update route constant to match documented path: /api/mobile/amodiataires/:id/announcements. Current path "/api/mobile/public/amodiataires/:id/announcements" does not match documentation.

codeExample.after: static readonly AMODIATAIRES_ANNOUNCEMENTS = '/api/mobile/amodiataires/:id/announcements';

tasks.testingNotes:
1. Update the route constant
2. Test all hooks using this route: Hooks using AMODIATAIRES_ANNOUNCEMENTS (analyze useApi.ts)
3. Verify API calls return expected data
4. Check for any hardcoded URLs in components

phases.name: TypeScript Interfaces

tasks.title: Create interface: ProfilePutResponse
tasks.description: Create TypeScript interface for ProfilePutResponse based on API documentation. This interface represents the response structure for the corresponding API endpoint.
tasks.testingNotes:
1. Add the interface to src/types/api.ts
2. Verify TypeScript compilation succeeds
3. Test with actual API response data
4. Verify all property types are correct

phases.name: React Query Hooks
phases.description: Create and update React Query hooks for API endpoints. These hooks provide data fetching, caching, and state management.

tasks.title: Create hook: useCreateMobileAnnouncements
tasks.description: Create React Query mutation hook for POST /api/mobile/announcements. Crée une nouvelle annonce et la soumet automatiquement pour validation.
tasks.testingNotes:
1. Add the hook to src/hooks/useApi.ts
2. Verify ANNOUNCEMENTS route constant exists
3. Verify AnnouncementsListResponse interface exists
4. Test hook with real API calls
5. Verify query key is unique: ["mobile","announcements"]
6. Test mutation success and cache invalidation
7. Test error handling scenarios

tasks.title: Fix route in hook: useNearbyAmodiataires
tasks.description: Update useNearbyAmodiataires to use correct route constant /api/mobile/public/amodiataires instead of /api/mobile/public/amodiataires/nearby. This ensures the hook calls the correct API endpoint.

codeExample.after: queryFn: () => get(ApiRoutes./api/mobile/public/amodiataires),

tasks.testingNotes:
1. Update the route constant in the hook
2. Verify /api/mobile/public/amodiataires exists in ApiRoutes
3. Test hook returns correct data from updated endpoint
4. Test in components: Components using useNearbyAmodiataires (analyze component files)
5. Verify no breaking changes in response structure

tasks.title: Add parameters to hook: useAmodiatairesMinimal

tasks.title: Fix query key in hook: useAmodiatairesMinimal
tasks.description: Update query key to be unique and include relevant parameters. Current key may cause cache collisions or incorrect data updates.

codeExample.after: queryKey: ["useamodiatairesminimal"],

tasks.testingNotes:
1. Update the query key to be more specific
2. Include all parameters that differentiate cached data
3. Test cache invalidation works correctly
4. Verify no duplicate cache entries
5. Test in components: Components using useAmodiatairesMinimal (analyze component files)
6. Verify data refreshes when parameters change

tasks.title: Add cache invalidation to: useLogin
tasks.description: Add onSuccess callback with cache invalidation to mutation hook. This ensures UI updates automatically after data changes.
tasks.testingNotes:
1. Import useQueryClient from @tanstack/react-query
2. Add onSuccess callback with invalidateQueries
3. Identify all related query keys that should be invalidated: ["login","list"], ["login","detail"]
4. Test that data refreshes automatically after mutation
5. Test in components: Components using useLogin (analyze component files)
6. Verify no unnecessary refetches occur

phases.name: Component Migration
phases.description: Update React components to use new hooks and interfaces. This ensures the UI correctly displays data from the updated API structure.

tasks.title: Migrate component: AmodiataireDetailsPage
tasks.description: Update to use new AmodiataireDetail interface structure. Update property access patterns and hook usage to match new API structure.
tasks.testingNotes:
1. Update hook usage: const { data: amodiataire } = useAmodiataireDetails(id); → const { data } = useAmodiataireDetail(id);
const amodiataire = data?.amodiataire;
2. Update property access:
   - amodiataire.raisonSociale → amodiataire.lot.raisonSociale
   - amodiataire.adresse → amodiataire.lot.adresse
   - amodiataire.photos → amodiataire.media.images
3. Test component renders correctly
4. Test all user interactions work
5. Test loading and error states
6. Verify no TypeScript errors
7. Test with real API data
8. Check for any hardcoded assumptions about data structure

tasks.title: Migrate component: MediaGallery
tasks.description: Update to use new MediaCollection interface structure. Update property access patterns and hook usage to match new API structure.
tasks.testingNotes:
1. Update hook usage: photos?.map(photo => ...) → media.images.map(image => ...)
2. Update property access:
   - photo (string URL) → image.url (MediaDetail object)
   - key={photo} → key={image.id}
3. Test component renders correctly
4. Test all user interactions work
5. Test loading and error states
6. Verify no TypeScript errors
7. Test with real API data
8. Check for any hardcoded assumptions about data structure

tasks.title: Update components using deprecated hooks
tasks.description: Search codebase for components using deprecated hooks and update them to use the new v2 hooks.
tasks.testingNotes:
1. Search for deprecated hook usage: grep -r "useAmodiatairesMinimal\|useOldHook" src/
2. Update each component to use new hooks
3. Update data access patterns for new response structures
4. Test each updated component thoroughly
5. Verify no console warnings about deprecated APIs

dependencies.reason: Component requires updated hooks and interfaces to be available

validationTests.name: Route Constants Validation
validationTests.description: Verify all route constants are defined and return correct paths

validationTests.name: Interface Compilation Test
validationTests.description: Verify TypeScript compilation succeeds with updated interfaces

validationTests.name: Hook Integration Test
validationTests.description: Verify hooks work correctly with API
